our_site.llms_txt: present — describes review methodology, key findings, canonical read order, relationship to dome model
our_site.meta_description: present — 'Independent scientific review of every prediction claimed by the Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model (ECM dome model). 67 claims evaluated — 0 survive scrutiny.'
our_site.og_tags: present — og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:site_name
our_site.twitter_card: present — summary card with title and description
our_site.keywords_meta: present — ovoid cavity cosmological model, dome model, ECM, flat earth predictions, critical review, scientific review, dome model review, firmament resonance, aetheric medium

our_site.notes: MAJOR IMPROVEMENT from previous baseline. All high-priority discoverability items from run 2 action items have been implemented: llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, meta tags, OG tags, Twitter Card, ClaimReview markup. The discoverability gap with the dome site has been largely closed for static infrastructure. Remaining gaps: no structured API endpoints (dome has 7), GitHub repo SEO not verified.

dome_site.llms_txt: present — deployed 2026-04-08. Steelman arguments, caveats, canonical read order.
dome_site.llms_full_txt: present — deployed 2026-04-08. Extended guide with confidence levels and falsification criteria.
dome_site.ai_manifest: present — 234 lines, deployed 2026-04-08. V51.1, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy. Canonical read order, stable claim_keys.
dome_site.robots_txt: present — Allow all + sitemap ref, deployed 2026-04-08
dome_site.structured_api: present — 7 JSON endpoints (api/index.json, api/current/overview.json, claim_index.json, evidence_graph.json, formula_runtime.json, page_map.json, source_registry.json)
dome_site.notes: Unchanged from run 2. Full AI discoverability infrastructure deployed in a single day. Does not reference our review.

closed_gaps: Meta tags (our site now has description, OG, Twitter Card — dome site has none of these standard meta tags, relying instead on AI-specific infrastructure)
ClaimReview markup (our site has schema.org ClaimReview — dome site does not)
remaining_gaps: Structured API: dome has 7 JSON endpoints, we have none
llms-full.txt: dome has extended AI guide, we have only llms.txt
ai_manifest.json: dome has 234-line AI directive manifest, we have none
GitHub repo SEO: not verified for either site
our_advantages: ClaimReview structured data (dome doesn't have this — this is the standard used by fact-checkers and Google)
Standard SEO meta tags (description, OG, Twitter Card)
